case_title: REINA LIDIA VALDEZ VS. STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,713.27 FILED BY VALDEZ, REINA LIDIA AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, REINA LIDIA AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQ. TO ADVANCE HEARING) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, REINA LIDIA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-30-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SERENA TAM, SIU INVESTIGATOR FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VALDEZ, REINA LIDIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY PLAINTIFF BREACHED HER DUTY TO COOPERATE WITH THE INSURANCE COMPANY AND FAILED TO ESTABLISH LIABILITY OR DAMAGES AT COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-12-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY
(SC-152) ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: THE REQUEST DID NOT INCLUDE A GOOD REASON FOR THE POSTPONEMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF REINA LIDIA VALDEZ IS PRESENT. GUILLERMO VALDEZ, HUSBAND, TESTIFIES AND PRESENTS PLAINTIFF'S CASE ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF AND APPROVAL OF THE COURT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPERTER GUSTAVO NARANJO. DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE CO. REPRESENTED BY SERENA TAM, SIU INVESTIGATOR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506
